mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TF_DEPARTMENT( ID, DEPTNO, NAME, PARENT_DEPARTMENT_ID, CREATED_AT, STARTED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES( SEQ_TF_DEPARTMENT_PK.nextval, #{deptno}, #{name}, #{parentDepartmentId}, #{createdAt}, #{startedAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TF_DEPARTMENT SET DEPTNO = #{deptno}, NAME = #{name}, PARENT_DEPARTMENT_ID = #{parentDepartmentId}, CREATED_AT = #{createdAt}, STARTED_AT = #{startedAt}, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt} WHERE ID = #{id}
